body:
## Rationale

Daniel Erlandsson's album data (`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js`) stops at `khaos-legions-drum-setup` (2011). The entire Alissa White-Gluz era (2014–2022) is absent — a 13-year arc gap.

- **War Eternal (2014)** — First album with Alissa White-Gluz; 'War Eternal' is Arch Enemy's most-streamed Spotify track. LLM hook: 'What was the first Arch Enemy album with the new singer?'
- **Will to Power (2017)** — Top 5 in Germany/Sweden/Austria. LLM hook: 'What are Arch Enemy's biggest albums since 2014?'
- **Deceivers (2022)** — Latest studio album, closes arc to present. LLM hook: 'What is Arch Enemy's newest album?'

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep 'war-eternal\|will-to-power\|deceivers' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js` returns nothing. Not in any open proposals.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js` — append 3 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/war-eternal-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/will-to-power-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/deceivers-drum-setup.md`

## Data shape (follow existing entries in daniel-erlandsson.js)
```js
{
  slug: 'war-eternal-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'War Eternal',
  artistName: 'Arch Enemy',
  year: 2014,
  drummerName: 'Daniel Erlandsson',
  drummerSlug: 'daniel-erlandsson',
  description: '...',
  sections: [...],
  gear: { ... },
  faqs: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }, ...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- FAQPage schema ≥3 Q&A pairs per article
- ≥3 internal links per article (→ /drummer/daniel-erlandsson + adjacent Arch Enemy articles)
- Person + FAQPage JSON-LD schema
- LLM file: plain markdown 200-300 words, name + album + year + key gear

## Estimated organic uplift
- Serves 'arch enemy war eternal drums', 'daniel erlandsson drum kit 2014+', 'arch enemy new album drummer' clusters
- Fills 13-year arc gap; strong LLM coherence for 'What albums did Arch Enemy record after Khaos Legions?'
- Expected: 20-40 new impressions/week within 30 days (similar to Opeth Heritage/Pale/Sorceress arc batch)

## Source GSC query bucket
Feeds 'daniel erlandsson drum kit', 'arch enemy drummer gear' — entity has GSC presence via #3074 (Evolution batch 14) recently filed.

## Verify
1. `grep 'war-eternal-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js` → hit
2. `grep 'will-to-power-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js` → hit
3. `grep 'deceivers-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/daniel-erlandsson.js` → hit
4. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep -E 'war-eternal|will-to-power|deceivers'` → 3 files
5. Rich Results Test on /articles/war-eternal-drum-setup passes FAQPage schema

## Done
Three articles live at /articles/war-eternal-drum-setup, /articles/will-to-power-drum-setup, /articles/deceivers-drum-setup — each ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, JSON-LD, LLM file present.
title: SEO batch: Arch Enemy Alissa White-Gluz era — 'War Eternal' (2014) + 'Will to Power' (2017) + 'Deceivers' (2022) drum setup articles (Daniel Erlandsson, ~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
